title: Improve board reports by contributing to Smart Spreadsheet team's research!📢

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, monday.com champions!
Stiltsoft, a partner of the monday.com marketplace (best known for the Smart Spreadsheet app), is here to collaborate with you on another awesome product from our team!
The new app will generate board reports without the hassle of manual data consolidation in a clear and concise format.
Here’s why you should be involved:
Shape the future: Your valuable feedback will directly influence the development of the tool.
Exclusive access: Be among the first to experience this pivotal tool!
Make a difference: Help to empower monday.com users to unlock the full potential of their data.
Who we’re looking for:

  • Individuals who can articulate their reporting challenges and desired functionalities.
  • monday.com users with experience in board reporting who have valuable insights to share.
    Does it sound like you? Please email me at ibelaya@stiltsoft.com to express your interest in participating, or simply reply to this post, and I’ll contact you myself, or book a meeting with me without further ado.
    image885×482 46 KB

posts.author: APICaptain (Calum Klesel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Iryna,

I’m excited about your new board reporting app! Here are a few reasons why I think I can bring some solid insights to the table:

  1. I’ve spent the last few years developing custom solutions, automations, and integrations on monday.com for various business functions, including reporting and data visualization. I’ve seen firsthand what works, what doesn’t, and I’m always looking for ways to make the platform even more powerful for my users.
  2. Having founded three businesses, I’ve gained a high level of business acumen. In my current role, I regularly interface with executive leadership and understand what’s important to them and how to present information in a clear, digestible way.
  3. I can provide feedback from multiple angles - whether it’s technical aspects like API optimization and performance or ensuring the tool is user-friendly enough to integrate smoothly into different workflows.

If you would like to talk further, feel free to reach me at contact@calumklesel.com

Cheers,
Calum

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @APICaptain ,
Thank you for answer . I’ve reached out to you via the email, but I’m afarid it could accidentally go to spam.
As you clearly expressed your experience with monday.com challenges, your perspective would be invaluable to our research. Would you be interested in participating in a short interview (approximately 20 maximum 30 minutes) to discuss your experience in more detail? If so, please book a convenient spot for our conversation, or you can send me your calendar, and I’ll adjust to it!
Thank you again for your interest in helping us improve reporting!
Best regards,
Irina
